footer.tagline: Tamper-proof degrees, verified on the Ethereum blockchain.
footer.bottomLine: Academic Integrity, Anchored on the Blockchain.

aria.sepolia: View Sepolia Etherscan (opens in new tab)

docsUi.verifyCtaDescription: Employers can look up any Altrium-issued degree by PRN - no account required.
docsUi.indexSummary: Altrium is a full-stack platform for issuing tamper-proof academic credentials as Soulbound Tokens on Ethereum. These docs walk you through the whole thing - from the first docker compose up to minting a degree, verifying it as an employer, and extending the API.

highlights.quickstart: Spin up the full stack in 15 minutes with Docker.
highlights.apiReference: Every REST endpoint, auth requirements, and rate limits.
highlights.smartContracts: Registry & SBT ABI surface, deployment workflow.
highlights.security: Auth, RBAC, PDF validation, transport hardening.

home.heroDescription: Universities mint immutable Soulbound Tokens for every graduate. Employers verify in seconds - no intermediaries, no fraud.
home.trustTitle: Built on Trust, Secured by Blockchain

studentSubmits.title: Student Submits
studentSubmits.desc: Upload your degree PDF and pay the verification fee to your university.

universityReviews.title: University Reviews
universityReviews.desc: The university admin verifies the document and approves the request.

sbtMinted.title: SBT Minted
sbtMinted.desc: An immutable Soulbound Token is minted on-chain with your degree metadata.

employerVerifies.title: Employer Verifies
employerVerifies.desc: Anyone can verify the degree using the student's PRN - free, instant, trustless.

student.title: Student
student.desc: Submit your degree for on-chain verification. No wallet needed - just your documents and PRN.
student.label: Go to Dashboard

admin.title: University Admin
admin.desc: Review submissions, approve degrees, and mint Soulbound Tokens. Full Web3 handled for you.
admin.label: Admin Panel

employer.title: Employer
employer.desc: Verify any graduate's credentials instantly using their PRN. Free access, no registration required.
employer.label: Verify Now

studentDashboard.title: Student Dashboard
studentDashboard.subtitle: Track your degree submission status and upload documents for approval.
studentDashboard.pendingReviewDesc: Submissions waiting for university admin verification
studentDashboard.approvedDesc: Verified submissions with on-chain minting in progress
studentDashboard.rejectedDesc: Submissions that need resubmission or correction

form.title: Submit Degree for Verification
form.degreeDocumentPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag your degree PDF here
form.paymentNote: Payment (Razorpay/UPI) is not wired yet; submit will create a PENDING entry for College Admin to mint.

toasts.documentFailed: Failed to load document. It may not have been approved or generated yet.
toasts.requiredFields: PRN number and Degree Title are required.
toasts.submitSuccess: Submission and document uploaded. College Admin will verify and mint on Sepolia.

universityDashboard.title: College Admin
universityDashboard.subtitle: Review submissions and mint verified degrees to Sepolia.
universityDashboard.pendingSubmissionsDesc: Items waiting for admin review and mint approval.
universityDashboard.approvedDegreesDesc: Credentials already verified and issued on-chain.
universityDashboard.revokeHint: Revoke any credential to mark it invalid on the platform.
universityDashboard.studentsEnrolledDesc: Active student profiles linked to this university.
universityDashboard.mintedHint: Minted submissions are persisted to backend and show up instantly.
universityDashboard.burnResetTitle: Test only: burns the NFT on-chain and resets submission to pending
universityDashboard.noDocumentToast: No document uploaded for this submission.

toasts.walletLinked: Wallet linked! On-chain roles are being granted...
toasts.walletSaveFailed: Could not save wallet address to your profile.

superadminDashboard.title: Platform Control Center
superadminDashboard.subtitle: Manage administrator approvals, monitor platform health, and oversee all registered users from one responsive dashboard.
superadminDashboard.snapshotDescription: Track latest signups, institution coverage, and credential flow without crowding the page.
